title: anthyllis vulneraria f. nivalis
intro: Anthyllis vulneraria f. nivalis, also known as Snowy Kidney Vetch, is a variety of the Kidney Vetch plant, a flowering legume native to Europe and Asia. This plant has been used in herbal medicine for its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it useful for wound healing, skin conditions, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Snowy Kidney Vetch include its ability to soothe digestive problems, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies for skin conditions and gastrointestinal issues. Herbal preparations of Snowy Kidney Vetch typically include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used internally or applied topically to the skin to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
